_description: Style presets — set 'active_preset' to apply a personality to all reviews and builds. Specialists evaluate against this style direction. Custom presets can be added.

serious-dashboard.description: Clean, functional, data-dense. Think Linear, Grafana, Vercel Dashboard.
serious-dashboard.animations: minimal — micro-interactions only (hover, focus), no entrance animations
serious-dashboard.colors: neutral palette (zinc/slate/gray), single accent color, dark mode preferred
serious-dashboard.typography: system fonts or clean sans-serif (Geist, Inter, DM Sans), monospace for data
serious-dashboard.layout: dense grid, sidebar nav, tables over cards, max information per viewport
serious-dashboard.icons: Lucide or Phosphor, 16-20px, stroke only, no fill

fun-lighthearted.description: Playful, warm, personality-forward. Think Notion, Figma, Slack.
fun-lighthearted.animations: generous — entrance animations, hover delights, scroll reveals, micro-celebrations
fun-lighthearted.colors: warm palette, multiple accent colors okay, pastels or saturated brights, light mode preferred
fun-lighthearted.typography: rounded sans-serif (Plus Jakarta Sans, Nunito, Quicksand), display font for headings
fun-lighthearted.layout: spacious, cards with rounded corners, generous whitespace, visual breathing room
fun-lighthearted.icons: Phosphor or custom, 20-24px, can mix filled and outline
fun-lighthearted.borders: rounded (12-16px), soft shadows, no harsh lines

animation-heavy.description: Motion-forward, cinematic, immersive. Think Apple, Stripe, Vercel homepage.
animation-heavy.animations: bold — parallax, scroll-triggered reveals, page transitions, 3D transforms, canvas/WebGL
animation-heavy.colors: high contrast, dark backgrounds, vibrant accents, gradients okay if intentional
animation-heavy.typography: display fonts for impact (Clash Display, Cabinet Grotesk), large hero text 64px+
animation-heavy.layout: full-bleed sections, asymmetric, cinematic proportions, viewport-height sections
animation-heavy.icons: custom SVGs with animation potential, no static icon libraries
animation-heavy.borders: minimal — rely on space and shadow, not borders

minimal-editorial.description: Typography-driven, content-first, quiet elegance. Think Medium, iA Writer, Monocle.
minimal-editorial.animations: almost none — subtle fade-ins only, respect prefers-reduced-motion
minimal-editorial.colors: near-monochrome, off-white/charcoal, one muted accent maximum
minimal-editorial.typography: serif for body (Newsreader, Literata, Instrument Serif), generous measure (65ch), large body text (18-20px)
minimal-editorial.layout: single column, wide margins, generous line-height (1.7+), no sidebars
minimal-editorial.icons: none or very sparse, text labels preferred
minimal-editorial.borders: hairline (0.5-1px) or none, large radius or no radius

startup-landing.description: Bold, conversion-focused, energetic. Think Vercel homepage, Linear landing, Raycast.
startup-landing.animations: moderate — hero animation, scroll reveals, hover states, product demos
startup-landing.colors: dark mode, vibrant gradient accents, high contrast CTAs
startup-landing.typography: geometric sans-serif (Geist, General Sans, Satoshi), large hero (56-72px), tight letter-spacing
startup-landing.layout: full-width hero, alternating sections, product screenshots/demos, social proof
startup-landing.borders: medium radius (8-12px), subtle glass effects okay
